articles.title: The AI Era Is Creating a Bug Hunting Arms Race
articles.raw_content: As attackers ramp up their AI exploit development, the search for software vulnerabilities is changing rapidly.
articles.summary: Los atacantes aceleran el desarrollo de exploits de inteligencia artificial, lo que cambia rápidamente la búsqueda de vulnerabilidades de software.

articles.title: Everyone is navigating AI security in real time — even Google
articles.raw_content: We're in the transition period -- all of us.
articles.summary: Estamos en un período de transición, un cambio que afecta a todos.
